parameters.name: postgres_named_query
parameters.description: Call this tool with ONE input — a single string that is EXACTLY one of these 5 query names (do not wrap it in JSON or any object, just send the raw string): style_profile_get | recent_audit_log | pending_actions_open | executions_summary_24h | spend_total. The tool returns {ok:true, query_name, rows:[...]} for a valid name, or {ok:false, query_name, error} otherwise. style_profile_get = the operator's learned style profile. recent_audit_log = last 10 bot actions + decisions. pending_actions_open = open HITL-pending actions. executions_summary_24h = n8n executions in last 24h grouped by status. spend_total = the system's cumulative AI/LLM spend in USD.

parameters.name: github_readonly
parameters.description: Call this tool with ONE input — a single raw string (do not wrap it in JSON or any object). Reads LIVE read-only data from this system's own GitHub repo as the system's GitHub App. Valid inputs: ci_runs = the 10 most recent CI workflow runs (status/conclusion/created); recent_commits = the 10 most recent commits; open_prs = currently-open pull requests; OR read_file:<path> to read the text contents of a repo file (a folder path returns a directory listing). Returns {ok, command, data}.

parameters.name: railway_readonly
parameters.description: Call this tool with ONE input — a single raw string that is EXACTLY one of: deploy_status | recent_logs (do not wrap it in JSON or any object, just send the raw string). Reads LIVE read-only data from this system's Railway deployment. deploy_status = the latest deployments and their status with createdAt + staticUrl. recent_logs = recent deployment logs of the newest deployment. Returns {ok, command, data}.
